'''Golh''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Golh system/Legends|Golh system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. An [[Water/Legends|aquatic]] planet, it was owned by [[Hydrospeare Corporation]], who used Golh as a test site for its aquatic projects, commonly aquatic weapons and military vehicles.

A group of [[Sedrian]] [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] operatives managed to reach Golh and ambush a test team. Only [[Doctor/Legends|Dr.]] [[Sere Lure]], a designer supervising operations, managed to escape, and she has since recommended any other aquatic world as test site.
